## Markets Edge Higher on SK Hynix Debut Day; SK Hynix Shares Soar

Strong debut-day price performance for SK Hynix alongside a broadly positive tape reduces the risk that the opening-day move was purely passive-flow-driven; reinforces institutional demand read from cluster af0e00a65026ddf0.

- Motley Fool market-wrap reports markets moved modestly higher on the day of SK Hynix's US debut, with SK Hynix shares soaring.
- No incremental fundamental content; color on debut-day price performance and broad market tone.
